name: Black Bean and Corn Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Dried black beans, rinsed and picked over
30 ounces Canned black beans, rinsed and drained
2 Ears corn, kernels cut off the cob
1 Avocado, peeled and pitted, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
1 small Red bell pepper, seeded and cut into 1/2-inch pieces
6 Green onions, tops left on, finely chopped
1 Fresh hot chile pepper, seeded and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. If using dried beans, place them in a large bowl and cover with water. Let soak for 6 to 12 hours.
2. Drain the beans and rinse well.
3. Place the beans in a large pot and add enough fresh water to cover by 1 inch. Bring to a simmer over medium-high heat, then reduce to low and simmer until just tender (about 1-1/2 to 2 hours).
4. Thoroughly drain the beans and let cool.
5. In a small jar, combine lime juice, olive oil, minced garlic, salt, and cayenne pepper. Shake well to mix.
6. In a large salad bowl, add cooked or canned beans, corn, avocado, bell pepper, tomatoes, green onions, chile pepper, and cilantro (if using). Pour the lime dressing over the salad and stir until everything is well coated.
7. Serve immediately or refrigerate until ready to serve. Adjust seasonings before eating.
Makes 4 to 5 main-course servings or 8 to 10 side-dish servings.
